creator: janos.mohacsi@bsd.hu
text:
On 10/24/11 16:12, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov wrote:
>
>> -WX_COMPS=    python
>> +WX_COMPS=    ${PYTHON_CMD}
>
> Hi, Janos.
>
> This change is wrong. "WX_COMPS=python" means that this port needs
> x11-toolkits/wxPython28 port for building/running. Please see
> Mk/bsd.wx.mk. This need to be fixed.
>
You are right. After fixing the port I check the port with  the portlint
tool. portlint suggested changing the python to ${PYTHON_CMD}. I
accepted it without checking the consequences. Please remove this
changes from the Makefile. Should I send a new patch?

Best Regards,
Janos Mohacsi
